paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65 as of July 21, 2026, with a change of 8.66 percent compared to the prior close and a change of -25.86 percent over a window of 21 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. This news was reported by TradingView on July 21, 2026. Additionally, there have been recent social posts discussing the company, including one about the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston and another about a trade at 6.80.

There have been several recent SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including an 8-K/A filing on July 21, 2026, which disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson and included a response letter from Everson. Other recent filings include an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, which announced the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and a SCHEDULE 13G filing on July 20, 2026. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
